body_rule: non-human cat body with compact paws, feline face, visible ears inside hood, whiskers, and small tail silhouette
composition_rule: single clean combat sprite, three-quarter front-facing stance, hood and floating pyramid/obelisk prop must read at game scale
must_keep: gold-brown tabby fur and mask-like face markings
deep navy hooded cloak with sand-gold trim
blue gem accents, ankh or dream-script symbols
mystic controller silhouette without human posture
reject: ordinary Egyptian costume on a person
palette drift away from navy, gold, brown, and blue
positive_prompt: faithful P0 battle sprite for Nephthys, a non-human hooded gold-brown tabby moon-sand agent cat controlling dreams with a floating pyramid prop; non-human cat body with compact paws, feline face, visible ears inside hood, whiskers, and small tail silhouette; single clean combat sprite, three-quarter front-facing stance, hood and floating pyramid/obelisk prop must read at game scale; hand-painted dream defense roguelite game sprite; transparent background; soft ink outline; compact readable silhouette; preserve exact costume, props, palette, and role identity from the source turnaround.
negative_prompt: human, humanoid, Cleopatra, human priestess, long human arms, long human legs, hands, fingers, ordinary costume, dog, mascot redesign, missing hood, missing pyramid, missing blue gems
